args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT artist_id, artist_name FROM listening_history WHERE artist_genres LIKE '%hebrew%'

SELECT track_id, track_name, artist_name, duration_ms FROM listening_history WHERE artist_genres LIKE '%hebrew%' AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM played_at::time) BETWEEN 13 AND 18 ORDER BY played_at DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT track_id, track_name, artist_name, duration_ms, COUNT(*) as play_count FROM listening_history WHERE EXTRACT(HOUR FROM played_at::time) BETWEEN 13 AND 18 GROUP BY track_id, track_name, artist_name, duration_ms ORDER BY play_count DESC LIMIT 20
